doi_resolves_to: Burkholderia bcpAIOB define unique TPS/CDI classes
note: BcpA = TpsA exoprotein of B.thailandensis TPS/CDI; DOI is the defining paper. No uniprot given.

doi_resolves_to: Delivery of CdiA nuclease toxins during CDI
note: CdiA = TpsA of E.coli 536 CDI (TPS/T5bSS). Q0T963=CDIA_ECOL5 strain536 UPEC, matches.

doi_resolves_to: P.aeruginosa c-di-GMP-regulated adhesin reinforces biofilm matrix
note: CdrA = TpsA adhesin secreted via CdrB (TPS). DOI (Borlee 2010) is defining paper. No uniprot.

doi_resolves_to: Intimin/Invasin export C-terminus via inverse autotransport
note: Intimin = T5eSS inverse autotransporter; DOI directly on intimin export. P43261=EAE_ECO57, matches.

doi_resolves_to: EspP novel extracellular serine protease of EHEC O157:H7
note: EspP = classical (T5aSS) SPATE autotransporter; plasmid-encoded so pO157 (NC_002128.1) correct. Q7BSW5=ESPP_ECO57.

doi_resolves_to: Prodomain of Bordetella FhaB affects mature C-term conformation
note: FhaB = TpsA of B.pertussis TPS (FhaC pore). DOI confirms FhaB as TPS substrate but is a prodomain mechanism paper, not the original secretion demo. P12255=FHAB_BORPE.

doi_resolves_to: Periplasmic chaperone QC of autotransporter Ag43
note: flu=Ag43 classical T5aSS autotransporter; DOI is an Ag43 chaperone-QC paper (confirms autotransport) not the original secretion characterization. P39180=AG43_ECOLI b2000.

doi_resolves_to: Translocator proteins in TPS family have multiple domains
note: HMW1A = TpsA adhesin of H.influenzae HMW1/HMW1B TPS; DOI characterizes the cognate HMW1B translocator of this system. No uniprot given.

doi_resolves_to: Lack of complementation between B.pertussis FHA and P.mirabilis HpmA secretion machineries
note: HpmA = TpsA hemolysin of P.mirabilis (TPS via HpmB). DOI uses HpmA secretion but focus is cross-complementation; establishes HpmA as TPS substrate. B4F0Z9=hpmA PMI2057.

doi_resolves_to: Structure of the secretion domain of HxuA from H.influenzae
note: HxuA = TpsA heme/hemopexin-binding exoprotein (TPS via HxuB). DOI is HxuA secretion-domain structure. P44602=HXUA1_HAEIN HI_0264.

IgA1 protease = archetypal T5aSS autotransporter; DOI confirms the secreted protease (right protein/subtype) but is a substrate-specificity paper, not the secretion-mechanism demo. Q51163 IgA1 protease N.meningitidis (496aa fragment entry).

doi_resolves_to: Inhibition of phagocytosis by H.ducreyi requires LspA1 and LspA2
note: LspA1 = large TpsA exoprotein of H.ducreyi (TPS). DOI is the defining LspA1/A2 paper. Q7VLE8=Large supernatant protein 1 lspA1 HD_1505.

doi_resolves_to: Inhibition of phagocytosis by H.ducreyi requires LspA1 and LspA2
note: LspA2 = paralogous TpsA exoprotein; same defining DOI as LspA1. No uniprot given; locus HD_RS04750 plausible for 35000HP.

doi_resolves_to: NadA, a novel vaccine candidate of N.meningitidis
note: NadA = T5cSS trimeric autotransporter adhesin; DOI is the defining NadA paper. Q9JXK7=NADA1_NEIMB NMB1994.

doi_resolves_to: Characterization of Pic, a secreted protease of S.flexneri and EAEC
note: Pic = T5aSS SPATE autotransporter of EAEC 042; DOI is the defining Pic paper. Q7BS42=PIC_ECO44 EC042_4593.

doi_resolves_to: P.aeruginosa PlpD is archetype of a novel T5SS
note: PlpD = T5dSS patatin-like autotransporter; DOI is the defining T5dSS paper. Q9HYQ6=PlpD PA3339.

doi_resolves_to: Sat, secreted autotransporter toxin of UPEC, is a vacuolating cytotoxin
note: Sat = T5aSS SPATE autotransporter of UPEC CFT073; DOI is the defining Sat paper. Q8FDW4=SAT_ECOL6 c3619.

doi_resolves_to: Secretion and activation of S.marcescens hemolysin by ShlB mutants
note: ShlA = TpsA hemolysin of S.marcescens (TPS via ShlB); DOI directly on ShlA secretion/activation. P15320=HLYA_SERMA shlA.

doi_resolves_to: Structure/sequence of Yersinia YadA and Moraxella UspAs reveal novel adhesin class
note: YadA = T5cSS trimeric autotransporter adhesin; DOI (Hoiczyk 2000 EMBO J) defines the TAA class incl. YadA. A1JUB7=YADA_YERE8 YEP0066.
